TC_Title: Verify Performance page opens from /performance route
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Login with valid employee credentials 2. Navigate to /performance
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Performance page loads 3. Self Performance Review section displayed 4. My Performance History section displayed

TC_Title: Verify Performance page displays all form fields and submit button
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Observe the form
Expected result: 1. Performance page displayed 2. Month field visible 3. Achievements field visible 4. Challenges field visible 5. Goals Next Month field visible 6. Suggestions for Improvement field visible 7. Submit Review button visible

TC_Title: Verify Month field defaults to current month
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Observe Month field value
Expected result: 1. Performance page displayed 2. Month field auto-populated with current month in YYYY-MM format

TC_Title: Verify Month is mandatory before submission
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test Data: Month: blank Achievements: Completed sprint tasks
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Clear Month field 3. Enter Achievements 4. Click Submit Review
Expected result: 1. Submission is blocked 2. Validation shown for Month 3. Record is not submitted

TC_Title: Verify Achievements is mandatory before submission
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Keep Month filled 3. Leave Achievements blank 4. Click Submit Review
Expected result: 1. Submission is blocked 2. Error shown: Month and achievements are required 3. Record is not submitted

TC_Title: Verify valid submission with only required fields succeeds
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test Data: Month: current month Achievements: Completed assigned deliverables
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Enter Month and Achievements only 3. Click Submit Review
Expected result: 1. Submission succeeds 2. Success message shown: Performance submitted successfully 3. Entry appears in My Performance History

TC_Title: Verify valid submission with all fields succeeds
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test Data: Month: current month Achievements: Completed module delivery Challenges: API delay Goals: Finish testing Suggestions: Improve sprint planning
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Fill all fields with valid data 3. Click Submit Review
Expected result: 1. Submission succeeds 2. Success message displayed 3. History refreshes with new or updated row 4. Achievements Challenges Goals Suggestions text areas are cleared

TC_Title: Verify optional fields can be left blank
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test Data: Month: current month Achievements: Delivered monthly tasks
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Fill Month and Achievements 3. Leave Challenges Goals Next Month Suggestions blank 4. Click Submit Review
Expected result: 1. Submission succeeds 2. No validation shown for optional fields 3. History entry created successfully

TC_Title: Verify submit button shows submitting state and prevents double submit
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Fill valid data 3. Click Submit Review repeatedly while request is in progress
Expected result: 1. Button changes to Submitting... 2. Submit button becomes disabled during request 3. Duplicate submission is prevented

TC_Title: Verify resubmitting same month before manager review updates existing entry
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in. 3. Existing unreviewed submission present for same month.
Test Data: Month: same existing month Updated Achievements: Revised progress summary
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Submit a review for a month 3. Edit data for the same month 4. Submit again
Expected result: 1. Submission succeeds 2. Same month entry is updated instead of duplicate row creation 3. Latest details shown in history

TC_Title: Verify reviewed month cannot be modified by employee
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in. 3. Existing reviewed submission present for selected month.
Test Data: Month: reviewed month Achievements: Modified text
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Select a month that already has manager review 3. Enter updated values 4. Click Submit Review
Expected result: 1. Submission is rejected 2. Error shown: Performance already reviewed and locked 3. Existing reviewed record remains unchanged

TC_Title: Verify My Performance History shows loading state while data is fetched
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Observe history section during initial load
Expected result: 1. My Performance History section displayed 2. Loading history... message shown while fetch is in progress

TC_Title: Verify My Performance History shows empty state when no submissions exist
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in. 3. No performance submissions exist for user.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Wait for history load
Expected result: 1. History load completes 2. Empty state shown: No submissions yet

TC_Title: Verify history table displays required columns when submissions exist
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in. 3. At least one performance submission exists.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Wait for history to load 3. Observe table header
Expected result: 1. Table is displayed 2. Columns Month Status Submitted At Manager Rating Manager Comments are visible

TC_Title: Verify history is sorted by latest submitted date first
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in. 3. Multiple submissions exist with different submitted dates.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Wait for history to load 3. Observe row order
Expected result: 1. Most recently submitted entry appears at the top 2. Remaining rows are sorted in descending submitted date order

TC_Title: Verify pending submission shows dash for manager rating and comments
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in. 3. At least one submitted but not reviewed record exists.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Locate a pending or submitted row without review
Expected result: 1. History row displayed 2. Manager Rating shows - 3. Manager Comments shows -

TC_Title: Verify reviewed submission displays manager rating and comments
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in. 3. At least one reviewed record exists.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /performance 2. Locate a reviewed row
Expected result: 1. Reviewed row displayed 2. Status shows Reviewed 3. Manager Rating shows saved rating 4. Manager Comments shows saved review comments

TC_Title: Verify unauthenticated user cannot access Performance page
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. User not logged in.
Test steps: 1. Clear token or logout 2. Try to access /performance directly
Expected result: 1. Protected page does not remain accessible 2. User is redirected to login or home page 3. Performance content is not shown

TC_Title: Verify manager performance review page opens from /manager/performance-reviews route
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access.
Test steps: 1. Login with valid manager credentials 2. Navigate to /manager/performance-reviews
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Performance Review Queue page loads 3. Queue title and subtitle displayed 4. Total and Pending counters displayed

TC_Title: Verify manager review page displays month filter status filter and Apply button
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /manager/performance-reviews 2. Observe filter section
Expected result: 1. Month filter visible 2. Status dropdown visible 3. Apply button visible 4. Default status is All

TC_Title: Verify queue loads on initial page open
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /manager/performance-reviews 2. Observe table during initial load
Expected result: 1. Queue fetch starts automatically 2. Loading queue... message displayed during load 3. Rows or empty state shown after completion

TC_Title: Verify Apply button reloads queue using selected month filter
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to manager performance review page 2. Select Month 3. Click Apply
Expected result: 1. Apply button triggers reload 2. Queue refreshes for selected month 3. Only matching records are shown

TC_Title: Verify Apply button reloads queue using Submitted status filter
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to manager performance review page 2. Select Status as Submitted 3. Click Apply
Expected result: 1. Queue reloads successfully 2. Only Submitted items are displayed in result set

TC_Title: Verify Apply button reloads queue using Reviewed status filter
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to manager performance review page 2. Select Status as Reviewed 3. Click Apply
Expected result: 1. Queue reloads successfully 2. Only Reviewed items are displayed in result set

TC_Title: Verify queue shows empty state when no performance submissions found
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. No rows exist for selected filters.
Test steps: 1. Apply filters with no matching records 2. Observe table
Expected result: 1. Queue load completes 2. Empty state shown: No performance submissions found

TC_Title: Verify queue table displays required columns when records exist
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. At least one queue row exists.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to manager performance review page 2. Wait for data load 3. Observe table header
Expected result: 1. Table columns Employee Emp ID Month Status Submitted At Manager Rating Action are visible

TC_Title: Verify meta counters show correct total and pending counts
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. Queue contains reviewed and submitted items.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to manager performance review page 2. Observe Total and Pending counters 3. Compare against queue rows
Expected result: 1. Total count equals total displayed rows 2. Pending count equals rows where status is not Reviewed

TC_Title: Verify Review button opens modal for unreviewed item
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. At least one unreviewed item exists.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to manager performance review page 2. Click Review for a submitted item
Expected result: 1. Review modal opens 2. Employee name and month shown in modal title 3. Achievements Challenges Goals Next Month Suggestions sections displayed

TC_Title: Verify reviewed item shows Update Review action
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. At least one reviewed item exists.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to manager performance review page 2. Locate a reviewed row 3. Observe Action button
Expected result: 1. Reviewed row displays Update Review button instead of Review

TC_Title: Verify modal pre-fills existing rating and comments for reviewed item
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. A reviewed item exists with saved rating and comments.
Test steps: 1. Click Update Review for a reviewed item 2. Observe modal fields
Expected result: 1. Rating dropdown shows saved rating 2. Comments textarea shows saved manager comments

TC_Title: Verify rating dropdown displays all allowed options
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. Review modal open.
Test steps: 1. Open review modal 2. Open Rating dropdown
Expected result: 1. Dropdown options displayed as Excellent Good Average Needs Improvement

TC_Title: Verify manager can save review with rating and comments
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. Review modal open for a submitted item.
Test Data: Rating: Excellent Comments: Strong delivery and ownership
Test steps: 1. Open review modal 2. Select Rating 3. Enter Comments 4. Click Save Review
Expected result: 1. Review saved successfully 2. Success message shown: Review saved successfully 3. Modal closes 4. Queue refreshes 5. Row status updates to Reviewed

TC_Title: Verify manager can save review with rating only and blank comments
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. Review modal open.
Test steps: 1. Open review modal 2. Keep Comments blank 3. Select Rating 4. Click Save Review
Expected result: 1. Review saves successfully 2. Comments remain blank or show - in related views 3. Submission is accepted because rating is present

TC_Title: Verify Save Review button shows saving state and prevents repeated clicks
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. Review modal open.
Test steps: 1. Open review modal 2. Click Save Review repeatedly while request is in progress
Expected result: 1. Button changes to Saving... 2. Save button becomes disabled during request 3. Duplicate save is prevented

TC_Title: Verify Cancel closes review modal without saving changes
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. Review modal open.
Test steps: 1. Open review modal 2. Modify Rating or Comments 3. Click Cancel
Expected result: 1. Modal closes 2. No success message shown 3. No review changes are saved

TC_Title: Verify clicking outside modal closes review modal
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. Review modal open.
Test steps: 1. Open review modal 2. Click outside the modal on the backdrop
Expected result: 1. Modal closes successfully 2. Queue page remains visible

TC_Title: Verify manager can update an existing review
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in with manager access. 3. Reviewed item exists.
Test Data: Updated Rating: Average Updated Comments: Needs better follow-up
Test steps: 1. Click Update Review for a reviewed item 2. Change Rating and Comments 3. Click Save Review
Expected result: 1. Review update succeeds 2. Success message shown 3. Queue refreshes 4. Updated rating is displayed in table

TC_Title: Verify unauthorized user cannot access manager performance review page
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Non-manager user logged in or user lacks manager access.
Test steps: 1. Login with non-manager credentials 2. Try to access /manager/performance-reviews
Expected result: 1. Access is denied 2. Manager review data is not accessible 3. Appropriate authorization error or redirect occurs
